item.title: [Segurança] SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Enables RCE via Malicious GGUF Model Files
item.description:
🚨 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Enables RCE via Malicious GGUF Model Files
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in SGLang that, if successfully exploited, could result in remote code execution on susceptible systems. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-5760, carries a CVSS score of 9.8 out of 10.0. It has been described as a case of command injection leading to the execution of arbitrary code. SGLang is a high-performance, open-source serving
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/sglang-cve-2026-5760-cvss-98-enables.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-6248 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-6248 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
The wpForo Forum plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary File Deletion in versions up to and including 3.0.5. This is due to two compounding flaws: the Members::update() method does not validate or restrict the value of file-type custom profile fields, allowing authenticated users to store an arbitrary path instead of a legitimate upload path; and the wpforo_fix_upload_dir() sanitization function in ucf_file_...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6248

item.title: [Segurança] CISA Adds 8 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets April-May 2026 Federal Deadlines
item.description:
🚨 CISA Adds 8 Exploited Flaws to KEV, Sets April-May 2026 Federal Deadlines
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.2
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Monday added eight new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, including three flaws impacting Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, citing evidence of active exploitation. The list of vulnerabilities is as follows - CVE-2023-27351 (CVSS score: 8.2) - An improper authentication vulnerability in PaperCut
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/cisa-adds-8-exploited-flaws-to-kev-sets.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-32311 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-32311 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Flowsint is an open-source OSINT graph exploration tool designed for cybersecurity investigation, transparency, and verification. Flowsint allows a user to create investigations, which are used to manage sketches and analyses. Sketches have controllable graphs, which are comprised of nodes and relationships. The sketches contain information on an OSINT target (usernames, websites, etc) within these nodes and relation...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32311

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-33031 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-33031 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Nginx UI is a web user interface for the Nginx web server. Prior to version 2.3.4, a user who was disabled by an administrator can use previously issued API tokens for up to the token lifetime. In practice, disabling a compromised account does not actually terminate that user’s access, so an attacker who already stole a JWT can
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33031

item.title: [Segurança] Actively exploited Apache ActiveMQ flaw impacts 6,400 servers
item.description:
💣 Actively exploited Apache ActiveMQ flaw impacts 6,400 servers
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Nonprofit security organization Shadowserver found that over 6,400 Apache ActiveMQ servers exposed online are vulnerable to ongoing attacks exploiting a high-severity code injection vulnerability.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/actively-exploited-apache-activemq-flaw-impacts-6-400-servers/

item.title: [Segurança] No Exploit Needed: How Attackers Walk Through the Front Door via Identity-Based Attacks
item.description:
💣 No Exploit Needed: How Attackers Walk Through the Front Door via Identity-Based Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The cybersecurity industry has spent the last several years chasing sophisticated threats like zero-days, supply chain compromises, and AI-generated exploits. However, the most reliable entry point for attackers still hasn't changed: stolen credentials. Identity-based attacks remain a dominant initial access vector in breaches today. Attackers obtain valid credentials through credential stuffing
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/no-exploit-needed-how-attackers-walk.html

item.title: [Segurança] CISA flags new SD-WAN flaw as actively exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 CISA flags new SD-WAN flaw as actively exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies four days to secure their systems against another Catalyst SD-WAN Manager vulnerability it flagged as actively exploited in attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-flags-new-sd-wan-flaw-as-actively-exploited-in-attacks/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Deploying Harbor Service in Air-Gapped VMware Cloud Foundation 9.0
item.description:
📰 Deploying Harbor Service in Air-Gapped VMware Cloud Foundation 9.0
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
Modern private cloud infrastructure demands enterprise-grade container registry capabilities, particularly in environments where external internet connectivity is restricted or prohibited. Within VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.0, deploying Supervisor Services in air-gapped environments presents unique technical challenges that require careful planning and precise execution. This guide provides a systematic approach...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/21/deploying-harbor-service-in-air-gapped-vmware-cloud-foundation-9-0/

item.title: [Segurança] The Gentlemen ransomware now uses SystemBC for bot-powered attacks
item.description:
📰 The Gentlemen ransomware now uses SystemBC for bot-powered attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A SystemBC proxy malware botnet of more than 1,570 hosts, believed to be corporate victims, has been discovered following an investigation into a Gentlemen ransomware attack carried out by a gang affiliate.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/the-gentlemen-ransomware-now-uses-systembc-for-bot-powered-attacks/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Why Enhanced DirectPath Wins for High-Performance Apps
item.description:
📰 Why Enhanced DirectPath Wins for High-Performance Apps
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Navigating the Passthrough Maze: Why Enhanced DirectPath Wins If you take a quick look through the vCenter UI, you’ll encounter a wide array of passthrough technologies: Fixed DirectPath (formerly just DirectPath or PCI Passthrough), Dynamic DirectPath, and Enhanced DirectPath. It can get confusing fast, not just regarding the technical differences, but how to best leverage …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/20/why-enhanced-directpath-wins-for-high-performance-apps/
